---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/wanganlin00
---

$$
     {\color{red} { life=\int_{birth}^{death}study \ dt } }  
$$

<a
id="cy-effective-orcid-url"
class="underline"
 href="https://orcid.org/0009-0003-7561-3856"
 target="orcid.widget"
 rel="me noopener noreferrer"
 style="vertical-align: top"> https://orcid.org/0009-0003-7561-3856 </a>

肿瘤生物学研究常用实验技术
